message:
chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs from latest local suite run (round 3)

Third pass of artifact regeneration on top of the F32 scalar bench
baseline addition. Same shape as the prior two
"chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs ..." commits — pure
timestamp/duration churn with no schema, status, or pass/fail diffs:

- artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json — generated_at_unix_ms / ts_utc_unix_ms /
  duration_ms only. Per-test passed/total/failed counts unchanged
  (e.g. e2e_adversarial_fixture_suite still 41/41 pass).
- artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/gj_*.golden.json — ts_utc_unix_ms only.
- artifacts/testing/logs/{fj-core, fj-interpreters, fj-trace,
  fj-conformance, fj-ad, fj-dispatch}/*.json — per-test timestamps.
- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json — run_id /
  started_at / finished_at / per-gate timestamps; the four synthetic
  failure summaries are byte-identical to HEAD.

Keeps the tracked artifact tree in lockstep with the latest local
suite run so future diffs against fresh runs remain meaningful, per
the existing repo convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
